title: Sun
description: Sun: An environment object used to define the position of the sun (in azimuth and elevation)

Azimuth.description: The azimuth position of the sun (in degrees clockwise from North; where 0 is North, 90 is East, etc.)

Altitude.description: The altitude position of the sun (in degrees above the horizon)

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
